summary: Completed comprehensive verification of requested improvements: settings persistence, auto-start/auto-refresh toggles, service management error handling, and Character Builder auto-fill fallback. All core functionality working correctly with proper SQLite storage and enhanced error handling.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 521 (web server down) instead of expected 502 when LM Studio offline
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - LM Studio unreachable from container environment as per context
minor_issues.note: This is expected infrastructure limitation mentioned in agent context

passed_tests: Settings API persists auto-start/auto-refresh preferences in SQLite
Settings API updates work correctly (individual and bulk updates)
Settings persistence verified across API calls
Service preferences panel loads with auto-start/auto-refresh toggles
Auto-start services toggle enables/disables correctly in UI
Auto-refresh services toggle enables/disables correctly in UI
Services start/stop buttons show proper notices without axios errors
Start-all services button works and returns status list
Stop-all services button works and returns status list
Individual service start/stop buttons show notices correctly
Services bulk operations process all services and return proper results
Character Builder auto-fill still works with LM Studio fallback behavior
Character Builder generates missing traits successfully when LM Studio offline
Character Builder shows appropriate notices for auto-fill operations
Services page loads correctly with preferences panel
Navigation between pages works seamlessly
No console errors or UI blocking issues
All requested features from review working as intended
Backend returns status:error instead of 500 for service operations
Error handling improvements working correctly
SQLite storage functioning properly for settings
UI feedback and notices working without axios errors showing to user
